description: The AvatarUserReferenceAssigner component is used to assign the user reference to a list of targets (depending on the ``AssignMode``). This component activates only when in the slot hierarchy of an Avatar and when a user equips it.

fields.AssignMode: How to use the list when assigning users to User storage fields.
fields.References: The references to scan through when assigning.

usage: This is often used with assigning the user reference to nameplates, and the components within.
